name: shaded
description: Single-file WebGL landing/app experience for SHADED.

scripts.check: node --check tools/verify.js && node --check tools/verify-actors.js && node --check tools/verify-editor.js && node --check tools/register.js && node --check editor/facade.js && node --check editor/markerPainter.js && node --check editor/actorPlacer.js && node --check editor/storyboardTimeline.js && node --check editor/app.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const m=h.match(/<script>([\s\S]*)<\/script>/); if(!m) throw new Error('index.html script tag not found'); new Function(m[1]); console.log('index script parses')"
